en_title: Microsoft Announces Significant Price Rises for Xbox Series X and S, 2TB Model Discontinued
cn_title: 微软宣布XBOX主机涨价，2TB停产
subtitle: 组件危机逼涨主机
opus_summary: 微软宣布XBOX Series X|S自8月1日起涨价：512GB版100美元(约合人民币681元)、1TB版150美元(约合人民币1021元)，2TB型号停产。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has announced significant price rises for Xbox consoles, blaming the ongoing “components crisis.”
paragraphs.cn: 微软宣布XBOX主机将大幅涨价，并将原因归咎于持续的「组件危机」。

paragraphs.en: In a blog post , Microsoft said that from August 1, the price of Xbox consoles will increase by $100 for 512GB models, and $150 for 1TB models. The 2TB model will be discontinued.
paragraphs.cn: 在一篇博文中，微软表示自8月1日起，XBOX主机将涨价，512GB型号上涨100美元(约合人民币681元)，1TB型号上涨150美元(约合人民币1021元)，2TB型号则将停产。

paragraphs.en: “Last October, we increased Xbox console price by $20-$70 in the U.S.” Microsoft said. “We hoped another price increase would not be necessary, and we have spent the last several months working with suppliers on options. Unfortunately, console storage and memory prices have increased by more than 2.5x and we expect another doubling by the fall of 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 「去年10月，我们在美国已经将XBOX主机的价格上调了20至70美元(约合人民币136至477元)(约合136至477元)，」微软表示，「我们原本希望不必再次涨价，过去几个月也一直在与供应商商讨应对方案。不幸的是，主机存储与内存芯片价格已上涨超过2.5倍，而且我们预计到2027年秋季还会再翻一番。」

paragraphs.en: "The entire consumer electronics industry is struggling with the current components crisis, but the effects are particularly hard on consoles. Unlike phones, computers, speakers, and other consumer devices, consoles are typically not sold at a profit, but instead for less than they cost to make.”
paragraphs.cn: 「整个消费电子行业都在当前的组件危机中挣扎，但主机受影响格外严重。与手机、电脑、音箱和其他消费设备不同，主机通常不以盈利为目的出售，售价反而低于制造成本。」

paragraphs.en: Alongside the price rise announcement, Microsoft pointed to Buy Now, Pay Later options that break up your payments, as well as interest free financing. It’s also working with retailers to make second-hand consoles available at lower prices, it said.
paragraphs.cn: 在涨价公告的同时，微软还提到了可以将付款拆分的「先买后付」方案，以及免息分期服务。微软还表示，正在与零售商合作，以更低价格提供二手主机。

paragraphs.en: “Players who are ready to upgrade or no longer use their console will be able to trade it in with participating retail partners for cash or store credit. Those consoles will then be made available at lower prices for players,” Microsoft said.
paragraphs.cn: 微软称：「准备升级或不再使用主机的玩家，可以在合作的零售伙伴那里以旧换新，换取现金或店铺点数，随后这些主机将以更低价格供应给其他玩家。」

paragraphs.en: Then there are ‘Certified Refurbished Consoles,’ which are available at Microsoft Stores for up to $100 off.
paragraphs.cn: 此外还有「官方认证翻新机」，在微软商城最高可享100美元(约合人民币681元)折扣。

paragraphs.en: The anouncement of the Xbox console price rises comes ahead of the release of GTA 6 in November, which is expected to increase demand for PS5 and Xbox Series X and S significantly. However, there are concerns that neither Sony nor Microsoft will be able to meet the demand caused by the release of GTA 6, with the AI boom making it particularly hard for hardware manufacturers not only to source components, but to release products at affordable prices.
paragraphs.cn: XBOX主机涨价的消息公布于11月《GTA6》发售前夕，该作预计将大幅拉高PS5和XBOX Series X|S的需求。然而，外界担忧索尼和微软可能都无法满足《GTA6》所带来的需求，因为人工智能热潮正让硬件厂商不仅难以采购组件，更难以用亲民的价格推出产品。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this month, new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma said the spiralling cost of new and existing consoles would require "radically different business models" over the coming generation. She added that the industry had "reached a point where it will be hard to imagine" mass audiences still being able to afford "thousands of dollars" for a new console generation.
paragraphs.cn: 本月早些时候，新上任的XBOX CEO Asha Sharma表示，新主机与现款主机成本节节攀升，下一代主机将需要「完全不同的商业模式」。她补充说，整个行业已经「走到了一个很难想象广大消费者还买得起几千美元一台新主机的境地」。

paragraphs.en: The current PS5 and Xbox Series X and S generation of consoles have seen price increases rather than cost savings. Sony itself raised the price of PS5 consoles back in March , blaming “continued pressures in the global economic landscape.” Nintendo has also not been immune, and recently acknowledged it would up the price of Switch 2, just over a year after its arrival. And Valve has bemoaned its struggle to release Steam Machine at the price it had initially hoped , instead having to go for an eye-watering $1,049.
paragraphs.cn: 当前这一代PS5和XBOX Series X|S主机都经历了涨价而非降价。索尼早在今年3月就已上调PS5售价，理由是「全球经济形势持续承压」，任天堂同样未能幸免，近期也承认将在Switch 2上市一年多一点后提价。Valve亦苦恼于无法以最初期望的价格推出Steam Machine，最终不得不定出1049美元(约合人民币7144元)这样令人肉疼的价格。

paragraphs.en: By way of comparison, the PS5 currently costs $649.99, the PS5 Digital Edition costs $599.99, and the PS5 Pro costs $899.99.
paragraphs.cn: 作为比较，PS5现售价649.99美元(约合人民币4426元)，PS5数字版售价599.99美元(约合人民币4086元)，PS5 Pro售价899.99美元(约合人民币6129元)。

paragraphs.en: Xbox is currently in the process of what Sharma called a "reset," which is expected to result in significant layoffs. There is concern over the future of Hellblade developer Ninja Theory, South of Midnight developer Compulsion Games, and Psychonauts developer Double Fine, although all Xbox studios are said to be worried about what happens next.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma称XBOX目前正在进行一场「重置」，预计将带来大面积裁员。《地狱之刃》开发商Ninja Theory、《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion Games以及《意航员》开发商Double Fine的前景均令人担忧，不过据说所有XBOX工作室都在为接下来的变数感到不安。

paragraphs.en: Sharma's ground-shaking memo revealed that Microsoft's gaming business currently has a 3% accountability margin (assumed to mean profit margin), which is down year-on-year. "Excluding Activision Blizzard King, over the past five years, we have spent over $20 billion on ongoing investments in our content, platform, and hardware subsidy, but our annual revenue has declined nearly half a billion during that time. Going forward, this cannot continue," Sharma said.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma那份震撼内部的文件显示，微软游戏业务目前的「问责利润率」（外界推测指净利润率）为3%，同比下滑。「若不算动视暴雪King，过去五年我们在内容、平台和硬件补贴上的持续投入已超过200亿美元(约合人民币1362亿元)，但同期年收入却减少了近5亿美元(约合人民币34亿元)。这种情况不能再继续下去了，」Sharma写道。

paragraphs.en: Following the release of the memo, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella said "there's more monetization of Xbox games happening on YouTube" than at Xbox , adding that the Xbox team needed to figure out how to "innovate both in hardware, as well as in the games, going forward in an economically viable way."
paragraphs.cn: 备忘录流出后，微软CEO Satya Nadella表示，「XBOX游戏在YouTube上的变现机会甚至比XBOX自身还要多」，并补充说XBOX团队需要弄清楚如何「在硬件和游戏两方面都进行创新，并以经济上可持续的方式继续前行」。

paragraphs.en: "No one can accuse Microsoft of not having invested for the last 25 years," Nadella added. "Now, we have to turn this into a sustainable business that delivers what is fundamentally one of the best sources of entertainment, still."
paragraphs.cn: 「没人能指责微软在过去25年里没有投入，」Nadella补充道，「现在我们必须将其转变成一项可持续的业务，继续提供本质上仍是最佳娱乐来源之一的内容。」

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN的新闻总监，可在Twitter上关注他 @wyp100，也可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com或保密邮箱wyp100@proton.me联系他。
